items.title: [Steam论坛] Question about rolling covenants, primary stat availability
items.summary:
I am trying to get LifeDrain covenants with keyflare regen as the primary stat. I have rolled many times (from Interlude) and cannot get any parts II, III or VI with keyflare regen as the primary stat, while I have got several parts I, IV and V with that primary stat. In fact, I have observed the same for all covenants I have, not just LifeDrain.

Is it possible to get any part of a covenant with the primary stat of my choice, or are there specific limitations? For example, perhaps only parts I,
items.author: Fanta
